FROM frpm f
JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE s.County = 'Alameda County'

WITH admin AS (
  SELECT AdmFName1 AS first_name, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName1 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName2, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName2 IS NOT NULL
  UNION ALL
  SELECT AdmFName3, District FROM schools WHERE AdmFName3 IS NOT NULL
),
top_names AS (
  SELECT first_name FROM admin GROUP BY first_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 2
)
SELECT DISTINCT a.first_name, a.District
FROM admin a
JOIN top_names t ON a.first_name = t.first_name
ORDER BY a.first_name, a.District;	----- bird -----	california_schools

  FROM client
  WHERE gender='F'
    AND birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM client WHERE gender='F')

  SELECT MIN(d.A11) AS min_avg
  FROM district d
  JOIN oldest_female of ON d.district_id = of.district_id
)

WITH first_loan AS (
  SELECT account_id
  FROM loan
  WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
  ORDER BY loan_id
  LIMIT 1
),
balances AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = first_loan.account_id AND date = '1993-03-22' ORDER BY trans_id DESC LIMIT 1) AS bal_1993_03_22,
    (SELECT balance FROM trans WHERE account_id = first_loan.account_id AND date = '1998-12-27' ORDER BY trans_id DESC LIMIT 1) AS bal_1998_12_27
  FROM first_loan
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN bal_1993_03_22 = 0 THEN NULL 
    ELSE ((bal_1998_12_27 - bal_1993_03_22) * 100.0) / bal_1993_03_22 
  END AS increase_rate
FROM balances;	----- bird -----	financial

254:
WITH bond_elements AS (
  SELECT b.bond_id,
         a1.element AS e1,
         a2.element AS e2
  FROM bond b
  JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
  JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
  JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
),
combo AS (
  SELECT bond_id,
         CASE WHEN e1 <= e2 THEN e1 ELSE e2 END AS el1,
         CASE WHEN e1 <= e2 THEN e2 ELSE e1 END AS el2
  FROM bond_elements
),
combo_counts AS (
  SELECT el1, el2, COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM combo
  GROUP BY el1, el2
)
SELECT CAST((SELECT cnt FROM combo_counts ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 1) AS REAL) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond) AS percentage;	----- bird -----	toxicology

285:
SELECT 
  CASE a1.element
    WHEN 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
    WHEN 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
    WHEN 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
    WHEN 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
    WHEN 's' THEN 'Sulfur'
    WHEN 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
    WHEN 'p' THEN 'Phosphorus'
    WHEN 'na' THEN 'Sodium'
    WHEN 'br' THEN 'Bromine'
    WHEN 'f' THEN 'Fluorine'
    WHEN 'i' THEN 'Iodine'
    WHEN 'sn' THEN 'Tin'
    WHEN 'pb' THEN 'Lead'
    WHEN 'te' THEN 'Tellurium'
    WHEN 'ca' THEN 'Calcium'
    ELSE a1.element
  END AS element1,
  CASE a2.element
    WHEN 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
    WHEN 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
    WHEN 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
    WHEN 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
    WHEN 's' THEN 'Sulfur'
    WHEN 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
    WHEN 'p' THEN 'Phosphorus'
    WHEN 'na' THEN 'Sodium'
    WHEN 'br' THEN 'Bromine'
    WHEN 'f' THEN 'Fluorine'
    WHEN 'i' THEN 'Iodine'
    WHEN 'sn' THEN 'Tin'
    WHEN 'pb' THEN 'Lead'
    WHEN 'te' THEN 'Tellurium'
    WHEN 'ca' THEN 'Calcium'
    ELSE a2.element
  END AS element2
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';	----- bird -----	toxicology

518:
SELECT DISTINCT bc.format, c.name
FROM (
    SELECT l.format, COUNT(*) AS banned_cnt
    FROM legalities l
    WHERE l.status='Banned'
    GROUP BY l.format
) bc
JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(banned_cnt) AS max_banned
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS banned_cnt
        FROM legalities
        WHERE status='Banned'
        GROUP BY format
    )
) mc ON bc.banned_cnt = mc.max_banned
JOIN legalities l ON l.format = bc.format AND l.status='Banned'
JOIN cards c ON c.uuid = l.uuid
ORDER BY bc.format, c.name;	----- bird -----	card_games

557:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN total = 0 THEN 0 
       ELSE ROUND(100.0 * elder_cnt / total, 2) 
  END AS percentage
FROM (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN u.Age > 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS elder_cnt
  FROM posts p
  LEFT JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
  WHERE p.Score > 5
) sub;	----- bird -----	codebase_community

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN s.speed_853 IS NOT NULL AND s.speed_854 IS NOT NULL AND s.speed_853 <> 0 
    THEN ((s.speed_853 - s.speed_854) * 100.0) / s.speed_853 
    ELSE NULL 
  END AS percent_faster
FROM (
  SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 853 THEN CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) END) AS speed_853,
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceId = 854 THEN CAST(r.fastestLapSpeed AS REAL) END) AS speed_854
  FROM results r
  JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
  WHERE d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND r.raceId IN (853,854)
) s;	----- bird -----	formula_1

955:
WITH champ AS (
    SELECT r.year,
           res.time
    FROM races r
    JOIN results res ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.position = 1
      AND res.time IS NOT NULL
      AND r.year < 1975
),
parts AS (
    SELECT
        year,
        time,
        INSTR(time, ':') AS c1,
        INSTR(time, ':', INSTR(time, ':') + 1) AS c2,
        INSTR(time, '.') AS d
    FROM champ
)
SELECT
    year,
    AVG(
        (CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, c1 - 1) AS INTEGER) * 3600) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(time, c1 + 1, c2 - c1 - 1) AS INTEGER) * 60) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(time, c2 + 1, d - c2 - 1) AS INTEGER)) +
        (CAST(SUBSTR(time, d + 1) AS REAL) / 1000)
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM parts
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;	----- bird -----	formula_1

1451:
WITH member_event_counts AS (
    SELECT e.link_to_member AS member_id,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ev.event_id) AS event_cnt,
           MAX(e.cost) AS max_cost
    FROM expense e
    JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
    JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
    GROUP BY e.link_to_member
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ev.event_id) > 1
)
SELECT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, mec.max_cost
FROM member_event_counts mec

1481:
WITH cust_2013 AS (
  SELECT ym.CustomerID,
         c.Segment,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  GROUP BY ym.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM cust_2013
  GROUP BY Segment
),
seg_lowest AS (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         SUM(c.total_consumption) AS sum_total,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt
  FROM cust_2013 c
  JOIN seg_min m
    ON c.Segment = m.Segment
   AND c.total_consumption = m.min_total
  GROUP BY c.Segment
),
seg_avg AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         CASE WHEN cnt = 0 THEN NULL
              ELSE sum_total * 1.0 / cnt
         END AS avg_consumption
  FROM seg_lowest
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_avg;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1482:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, substr(ym.Date,1,4)
),
seg_totals AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
    FROM seg_totals
    WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct_increase
FROM pct
ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
